text.message: want to make a deal for this 3:1 port on 4 ore
i can give it to you if you trade me 2 wood
i'll do 2-2 if you leave me the 8-3 settle and you take sheep port
yeah i was slow on that one
also a bit nervous you'll betray...
betray what? no deal has been made
i mean if i make deal
if you want wood its all yours lol
i can do for ns if interesting?
are you going to run out of time on every turn? haha
i should have just gone to the 8-10
ok, will accept for no plow :)
not a good deal for me there
not worth it if it helps you plow me
well blue has that regardless now i think
i can trade you ores though
not trading you wheat all game if you plow
yall aren't trading it so i need the 83
i can do wood wheat for 2 ore
jeez, that 9 block was death for me.  sigh
rob mr 2 points,  fine with me
red you think this gives black the W?
congratulations  blue, you have 2 enemies now
good luck winning this one xx
bro is on 5 points 11 cards and still upset
i told you i wouldn't trade you if yo uplowed
and we didn't trade, so there was no deal
get why you'd do it tho
yeah, i know you didn't break a deal
thanks, i just need the wheat and can't trade black since he so ahead
rob me if you want, tis fine
any chance you could remove embargo?
any chance yu can pick your settle up and put it somewhere else?
don't really wanna help you win
i won't solo you again (if i get another 7), but don't wanan help you either
idk blue could be straight up in the lead depending on what those devs are
black got road locked and open settle
well nobody is challenging army either
lol.  come on dude.  you got army and 2 down devs
you nearly roll a city every 9
you have the most explosive rolls for quick finish
settle, city, city is gg and you could have that with one orbit if 9 ore isn't blocked
and the 7 just never rolls so no slowdown ever
just pop your vp and end it!
now you guys just need to plow the other one :)
